---
title: "Building and maintaining a Bioconductor package: a practical guide"
description: |
  TALK DESCRIPTION
author:
  - name: Ossama Edbali
    url: URL
date: 2026-04-21
categories:
  - bioconductor
image: featured.jpg
draft: false
lightbox: true # N.B. need blank line between photos for this to work
---

## Overview

## Event details

**Date:** DATE

**Time:** TIME

**Location:** LOCATION

**Teams**: [TEAMS LINK](url)

## About the speaker

## Resources

- [Slides](URL){target="_blank"} [or add pptx/pdf to resources directory]

</iframe>

## Photos

Add after the event

-->
